ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "flight_name" TEXT /* Name of the flight (e.g., Flight1) */,
  "departure" TEXT /* Departure location of the flight */,
  "arrival" TEXT /* Arrival location of the flight */,
  "airline" TEXT /* Airline operating the flight */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the flight (e.g., AA123) */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of aircraft used for the flight */,
  "scheduled_departure_time" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time of the flight */,
  "actual_departure_time" TEXT /* Actual departure time of the flight */,
  "scheduled_arrival_time" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time of the flight */,
  "actual_arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual arrival time of the flight */,
  "gate_number" TEXT /* Gate number where the flight departs or arrives */,
  "terminal" TEXT /* Terminal where the flight is operating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_windows" (
  "time_window_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time window */,
  "time_window_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the time window in minutes */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the time window */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the time window */,
  "window_type" TEXT /* Type of time window (e.g., morning, evening) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_window_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "screening_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the screening result */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight associated with the screening result */,
  "time_window_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time window for the screening result */,
  "selectee" INTEGER /* Number of selectee passengers */,
  "unknown" INTEGER /* Number of unknown passengers */,
  "lowrisk1" INTEGER /* Number of low-risk group 1 passengers */,
  "lowrisk2" INTEGER /* Number of low-risk group 2 passengers */,
  "lowrisk3" INTEGER /* Number of low-risk group 3 passengers */,
  "lowrisk4" INTEGER /* Number of low-risk group 4 passengers */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total number of passengers screened */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the screening was conducted */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the screening process in minutes */,
  "total_passengers" INTEGER /* Total number of passengers screened */,
  "total_screening_time" INTEGER /* Total time taken for the screening process */,
  "average_screening_time" REAL /* Average time taken per passenger */,
  "incidents_reported" INTEGER /* Number of incidents reported during the screening */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_screening_results_time_window_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_window_id") REFERENCES time_windows ("time_window_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_screening_results_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Selectee, Unknown) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_levels" (
  "risk_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk level */,
  "risk_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the risk level (e.g., Low Risk 1) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the risk level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., security personnel, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the screening result being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES screening_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "regulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulation being complied with */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "last_audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last audit performed */,
  "next_audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the next planned audit */,
  "responsible_person" TEXT /* Name of the person responsible for compliance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "screening_equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment (e.g., X-Ray Machine) */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of the equipment (e.g., metal detector) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the equipment (e.g., operational, out of service) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "screening_protocols" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protocol */,
  "protocol_name" TEXT /* Name of the protocol (e.g., Standard Screening Protocol) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the protocol */,
  "protocol_version" TEXT /* Version number of the protocol */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the protocol became effective */,
  "last_review_date" TEXT /* Date when the protocol was last reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident report */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight associated with the incident */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken in response to the incident */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who reported the incident */,
  "incident_location" TEXT /* Location where the incident occurred */,
  "incident_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the incident (e.g., minor, major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight being assessed */,
  "time_window_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time window for the assessment */,
  "risk_level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk level assigned to the flight */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assessment */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments regarding the assessment */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the assessment */,
  "assessment_method" TEXT /* Method used for the assessment */,
  "assessment_score" REAL /* Numerical score representing the risk level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_risk_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("risk_level_id") REFERENCES risk_levels ("risk_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_time_window_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_window_id") REFERENCES time_windows ("time_window_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)
